acceptance_targets: [ch16-f001] PASS if the revised passage between snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:208 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:230 contains a direct Marisol-vs-family exchange of at least 3 consecutive dialogue/action beats with specific bodily detail, and Gloria's departure at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:306 is preceded by an explicit interpersonal break on page; FAIL if the climax remains primarily summarized as crowd noise or abstract split.

[ch16-f002] PASS if, before or by snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:312, Marisol makes one irreversible in-scene choice that directly responds to family rupture and changes the next-scene trajectory; FAIL if the sequence remains mostly reactive Q&A plus headline escalation without a decisive action beat.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised passage between snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:208 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:230 contains a direct Marisol-vs-family exchange of at least 3 consecutive dialogue/action beats with specific bodily detail, and Gloria's departure at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:306 is preceded by an explicit interpersonal break on page; FAIL if the climax remains primarily summarized as crowd noise or abstract split.
findings.problem: Sanitization drift at the chapter's peak rupture: the prose pulls back into summary/montage (crowd noise, social-media optics) instead of fully rendering the immediate family collision it has set up, reducing embodied consequence right when specificity is most needed.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework the immediate aftermath around snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:208, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:218, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:230, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:306 so at least one sustained on-page confrontation occurs between Marisol and either Gloria or Carina before the media beat; replace generalized crowd-summary lines with concrete actions, quoted speech, and physical responses tied to named characters.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if, before or by snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:312, Marisol makes one irreversible in-scene choice that directly responds to family rupture and changes the next-scene trajectory; FAIL if the sequence remains mostly reactive Q&A plus headline escalation without a decisive action beat.
findings.problem: Causal priority blurs after the poem: extended press handling takes foreground while the core dramatic line (family rupture and Marisol's immediate consequential choice) is deferred, softening momentum from act to cost.
findings.rewrite_direction: Tighten or interleave the press sequence at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:248, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:272, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:312 with a decisive immediate-action beat from Marisol tied to family fallout (for example: pursuit/refusal/call-for-help boundary) before the headline lands.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Prioritize structural and craft blockers first: causality, chapter architecture, stakes clarity, continuity logic, and all HIGH/CRITICAL defects.
revision_pass.label: HIGH/CRITICAL structural/craft fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: When choosing between reputationally safe abstraction and specific discomfort, choose specificity. Render addiction, sexuality, deceit, class shame, and grief at lived scale. In edge cases, preserve character truth and causal accountability over reader comfort or institutional decorum.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If a scene demands bodily, moral, or economic specificity, euphemistic phrasing is treated as a failed draft and must be rewritten with concrete stakes and observable consequence.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: high - contractions are the spoken default; full forms appear only for emphasis, ritual language, or character-specific formal posture

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate scene density and pressure modes: pair high-conflict chapters with quiet domestic or documentary chapters, vary dialogue-to-interiority ratios, and prevent identical chapter skeletons in consecutive sequence.
prose_style_profile.diction: contemporary literary diction with class-aware, borough-specific concreteness; avoid prestige-neutral workshop language
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: close third centered on Marisol, with rare brief distance expansions for institutional scenes
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: alternating tensile compression and reflective extension; line-level cadence should carry emotional pressure, not just information
